title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 14 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 14 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 14 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 14/12/2021
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends，an decrease of 0.61% throughout the day; the main contract closed 650.5. The spotquotation in the morning almost kept steady. some traders were active to sell, Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see.total transactions was good.
